prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等物理类核心专业社会热度持续高热推荐，报考意愿强烈；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万人（较2025年增长约45.6%），按近年物理类占比 约73%估算，物理类考生约38.0万人，较2025年26.1万人大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；省控线2025年463分，近年稳中有升；福州大学位于福建省，属华东区域，与 江苏省地理距离适中；该校在江苏省物理类招生约60人左右，占该校全国招生总量比例较小，招生体量对位次波动较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划与2025 年基本持平（仅缩招1人），但江苏省物理类考生大幅增长约45.6%，竞争净加剧；同时计算机、电子信息、电气等热门专业持续高热，推高报考热度；软科排名稳步提升亦增强学 校吸引力。预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年34888名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约34900名，区间34400–35400名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 25631 → 32307 → 34853 → 38210 → 34888, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend, peaking at 38210 in 2024 before rebounding to 34888 in 2025; over the past 4 years, the cumulative downward shift is approximately 9257 places, with significant fluctuations; enrollment plans for Physics Category were 58 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 62 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 61, a reduction of only 1 person (-1.6%) compared to 2025, essentially stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings, with a steadily rising trend in recent years (79→72→73→81→77), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition; there was a somewhat negative campus safety incident in 2024, but no new negative public opinion in 2025–2026; Douyin popularity is average (overall rank 88), short video exposure is moderately low, with no abnormal signals in application popularity; no history of enrollment gaps; Chemistry A- is the only A-level discipline at Fuzhou University, directly corresponding to majors such as Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Engineering, and Polymer Materials and Engineering in Physics Category, providing some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation remain highly popular and recommended, with strong application intentions; the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is approximately 521,000 (an increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025), and based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 380,000, a significant increase from 261,000 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 463 points, with a steady upward trend in recent years; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, in the East China region, with moderate geographical distance from Jiangsu Province; the university enrolls about 60 students in Physics Category in Jiangsu, accounting for a small proportion of its total national enrollment, making the enrollment size sensitive to ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan is essentially unchanged from 2025 (only a reduction of 1 person), but the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province has increased significantly by about 45.6%, leading to intensified competition; at the same time, popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, driving up application enthusiasm; the steadily improving Soft Science ranking also enhances the university's appeal. It is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly downward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 ranking of 34888, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 34900, in the range of 34400–35400.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 5464 → 6073 → 5804 → 6638 → 7023, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1559 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 7023, the highest ranking in the past 5 years (largest number); enrollment plans for History Category were 14 in 2021, 12 each in 2022–2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10, a reduction of 3 (-23.1%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that theoretically lowers competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fuzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 77th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 72–81 range in recent years, placing the university in the mid-to-upper tier nationally; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but no new negative public opinion emerged in 2025–2026; Douyin popularity total ranking is 88th (average evaluation), with short video platform exposure at a mid-to-low level, showing no clear signs of increased application interest; Chemistry is an A- discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A-level discipline at Fuzhou University; History Category enrollment majors (Intellectual Property, Chinese Language and Literature, Logistics Management, English) have no direct connection to the Chemistry discipline, so the pull effect of the advantageous discipline on History Category applications is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have high social popularity, attracting some History Category candidates; the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000 (an increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025), and based on the recent History Category proportion of about 27%, the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 141,000, a significant increase from 97,000 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 was 482 points, steadily rising in recent years, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with a moderate geographical distance from Jiangsu Province; it is not a local university but belongs to the East China region, with good acceptance for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province is about 2–3%, a relatively small scale, making ranking fluctuations sensitive to enrollment volume.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two opposing forces of a 23.1% reduction in History Category enrollment plans in 2026 (reducing competition) and a significant increase of about 45.6% in History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (intensifying competition), the candidate growth far exceeds the enrollment reduction, resulting in a net intensification of competition; combined with factors such as high popularity of liberal arts majors and a continuously rising provincial control line, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) from the 2025 baseline of 7023, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 6250, and a range of 5750–6750.
